baseline.short_reason: Composition carried this frame into the A-cut, helped by technical quality.

baseline.short_reason: It stayed in on a narrow margin because background cleanliness and composition barely outweighed technical quality and aesthetic score.
baseline.detailed_reason: Ranked #3 with a final score of 0.568, staying 0.011 above the cut line. It survived the cut line by holding a small edge on background cleanliness and composition while technical quality and aesthetic score stayed softer. Relative to KakaoTalk_20260330_180646779_07.jpg, the score edge was slightly higher by 0.011, driven mostly by background cleanliness and overall image appeal, although technical quality was weaker. On the VILA side, composition supported the pick more than lighting and overall image quality hurt it.
